name: Universal GOLD & GUN Exchange
description_short: Universal Jewelry & Loan offers secured pawn loans on jewelry, gold, and firearms with 3-month renewable terms. Located in Hazel Park, MI, they emphasize fair valuations and modern shop amenities.
description_long:
Universal Jewelry & Loan, Inc., operating as Universal Pawn & Gun Exchange, is a Michigan-based pawn shop specializing in collateral-based lending. The business has positioned itself as a modernized alternative to traditional pawn shops, offering a welcoming environment with carpeted floors, soft music, and organized displays of inventory. The company's primary focus is providing quick cash loans secured by personal valuables.

The company offers secured pawn loans where customers bring items of value—jewelry, gold, guns, and other merchandise—and receive immediate cash based on the shop's valuation. The standard loan term is 3 months, with the option to renew by paying interest and storage fees for additional 3-month periods. They also facilitate buy, sell, trade, and layaway transactions. Their inventory reportedly includes hundreds of firearms and jewelry pieces. The jewelry department operates as a dedicated service area offering one-on-one consultation, premium selections, and custom-order options for new pieces.

Universal Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself through emphasis on honesty, integrity, and respect as core values. The shop has invested in physical environment improvements—carpeted floors, modern aesthetics, and background music—to differentiate from stereotypical pawn shop experiences. They highlight fair valuations and secure, insured storage of pawned items. The business also actively markets special promotions, with recent advertising focused on reduced gun prices.

The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry implicit high costs: while APR is not disclosed on the website, renewal fees accumulate over time and can exceed the original loan value. Customers risk losing items if they cannot afford renewal fees. The business operates limited weekend hours (Saturday only until 4 p.m., closed Sundays), which may limit access. Pawn lending is fundamentally a high-cost, short-term financial solution suitable only for customers with alternative means to recover pawned items within the renewal cycle.
address: 24834 John R Rd, Hazel Park, MI 48030

company_info.headquarters: 24834 John R Rd, Hazel Park, MI 48030

pros: Immediate cash disbursement at point of transaction—no approval delays
Renewable 3-month terms with flexible extension options for customers needing more time
Dedicated jewelry department with custom-order options for premium pieces
Inventory reportedly includes hundreds of guns and jewelry items to purchase or trade
Modern, organized shop environment with secure, insured storage of pawned items
Accessible location in Hazel Park, MI with phone support at (248) 542-5921
Buy, sell, trade, and layaway options beyond pawn lending
cons: Pawn renewal fees accumulate over time with no stated APR disclosure—true cost of borrowing is opaque
Items are forfeited if customers cannot afford renewal fees, creating risk of permanent loss
Limited weekend hours (Saturday only until 4 p.m., closed Sundays) restrict access for some customers
Pawn loans are unsustainable long-term borrowing; renewal cycle can trap borrowers in recurring debt
No information provided on loan-to-value ratios or valuation methodology
best_for: Customers needing immediate small cash amounts ($100-$5,000) who own valuable items and can repay within 3 months
People seeking to buy, sell, or trade firearms, jewelry, or gold without financing
Customers with flexible timelines who can manage periodic renewal payments to recover pawned items
diagnosis: Universal Jewelry & Loan is best for customers in genuine short-term cash emergencies who own valuable items (jewelry, guns, gold) and can realistically repay within 3 months. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are high-cost, collateral-dependent borrowing with no disclosed APR; renewal fees accumulate quickly, and items are permanently forfeited if customers cannot afford ongoing renewals. This is not a sustainable debt solution and should only be used as a last resort.
services: Pawn loans (3-month renewable terms on jewelry, gold, firearms, and valuables)
Item purchase and buyout of customer valuables
Buy transactions for firearms and jewelry
Sell services—customers can purchase inventory items
Trade-in services for jewelry, guns, and other goods
Dedicated jewelry consultation and custom jewelry ordering
Secure, insured storage of pawned items during loan period
Firearms sales with inventory of hundreds of guns
meta_description: Pawn shop in Hazel Park, MI offering secured loans on jewelry, gold, and firearms with 3-month renewable terms.
